title: BBMB Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 20 Posts
short_info: Bhakra Beas Management Board (BBMB) has released the official Apprentice Notification 2026. A total of 20 vacancies have been announced under the BBMB Apprentice Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with 10th class with minimum 40% marks and ITI in the respective trade for Lineman and Electrician, and 8th class pass for Gardner, can apply online till 11-06-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th class with minimum 40% marks and ITI in respective trade for Lineman and Electrician, 8th class pass for Gardner
qualification.details: Lineman: Passed 10th class with minimum 40% marks and National Trade Certificate in Lineman trade from NCVT/SCVT. Electrician: Passed 10th class with minimum 40% marks and National Trade Certificate in Electrician trade from NCVT/SCVT. Gardner: Passed 8th class examination from recognised school or equivalent.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary/stipend details.

selection_process: Merit List based on 10th and ITI marks Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BBMB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
